Hero.subtitle: Lộc Trời offers high-quality agricultural products, agrochemicals, fertilizers, and seeds to support Cambodian farmers.
Hero.description: Welcome to Loc Troi! We supply high-quality crop protection products, fertilizers, and rice seeds to help Cambodian farmers increase yields and effectively protect crops from pests. Choosing Loc Troi means choosing success!

About.desc: Lộc Trời Cambodia is committed to providing the highest quality agricultural products, including crop protection, fertilizers, and seeds to help farmers achieve high yields and better livelihoods.

Products.subtitle: Discover high-quality agrochemicals, fertilizers, and seeds for all types of crops.

Testimonials.desc: Voices from farmers and partners who have chosen Lộc Trời Cambodia
Testimonials.t1_text: I've been using Lộc Trời products for over 3 years. My rice yield increased by over 30%. Highly satisfied!
Testimonials.t2_text: Lộc Trời's fertilizers are of high quality, crops grow well, and their technical team provides great advice.
Testimonials.t3_text: The best business partner! Quality products, satisfied customers, and fast delivery.
Testimonials.t4_text: Lộc Trời's crop protection products are highly effective. Pests die quickly and it doesn't harm the crops.

FAQ.subtitle: Answers to our customers' most common questions
FAQ.q1: Does Lộc Trời deliver to all provinces?
FAQ.a1: Yes, we deliver to all 25 provinces across Cambodia. We offer free delivery for bulk orders.
FAQ.a2: You can order directly by calling 097 945 0831 or 071 777 3554, through our Facebook Page, or by filling out the contact form on this website.
FAQ.q3: What is special about Lộc Trời products?
FAQ.a3: Our products are manufactured by Lộc Trời Group, a leading agricultural company in Vietnam with over 10 years of experience. All products are tested and certified by relevant authorities.
FAQ.q4: Do you provide agricultural technical consultation?
FAQ.a4: Yes! Our technical team is ready to provide free consultation on product usage, choosing the right chemicals, and other agricultural techniques.
FAQ.q5: Are your crop protection products safe?
FAQ.a5: All our products are legally registered and safe when used as directed. Please read labels and follow usage instructions carefully.
